response:
## Current Position

The project is a stable alpha runtime. Core infrastructure works: memory core, agent wrapper, write/retrieval policies, session persistence, and terminal demo are in place. All 131 tests pass; product, long-task, and conflict regressions are green. A working-set/query layer has been added on top.

What it is not yet: a practical production agent. The runtime still lacks a unified schema, first-class procedural memory, reusability tiers, a formal `WorkingSet` abstraction, and a stable query API.

## Three-Stage Roadmap

**Stage 1 鈥� Schema foundation.** Define and implement the core objects (Node, Relation, Hyperedge, Procedure, WorkingSet) with a single formal API. This unifies the current scattered structures.

**Stage 2 鈥� Procedural memory and reusability.** Add first-class storage for playbooks, checklists, and templates. Introduce reusability tiers (`instance_only`, `task_local`, `project_reusable`, `cross_task_reusable`) so memory is no longer task-local only.

**Stage 3 鈥� Query API and integration polish.** Build a stable query layer for runtime questions (current task state, dominant conflict, applicable procedures, handoff readiness). Formalize interfaces for embedding and LLM integration.

## Next Concrete Step

Implement the unified schema: create `src/hypergraph_bistability/schema

## Current Position

The project is a stable alpha runtime. Core infrastructure works: memory core, agent wrapper, write/retrieval policies, session persistence, and terminal demo are in place. All 131 tests pass; product, long-task, and conflict regressions are green. A working-set/query layer has been added on top.

What it is not yet: a practical production agent. The runtime still lacks a unified schema, first-class procedural memory, reusability tiers, a formal `WorkingSet` abstraction, and a stable query API.

## Three-Stage Roadmap

**Stage 1 鈥� Schema foundation.** Define and implement the core objects (Node, Relation, Hyperedge, Procedure, WorkingSet) with a single formal API. This unifies the current scattered structures.

**Stage 2 鈥� Procedural memory and reusability.** Add first-class storage for playbooks, checklists, and templates. Introduce reusability tiers (`instance_only`, `task_local`, `project_reusable`, `cross_task_reusable`) so memory is no longer task-local only.

**Stage 3 鈥� Query API and integration polish.** Build a stable query layer for runtime questions (current task state, dominant conflict, applicable procedures, handoff readiness). Formalize interfaces for embedding and LLM integration.

## Next Concrete Step

Implement the unified schema: create `src/hypergraph_bistability/schema
